title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Meesho - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Meesho - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Meesho. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Meesho:
Meesho is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho!
